recommendations.title: Don't Die Too Hard!
recommendations.overview: Eric and Ramzy are working as window washers at the Montparnasse skyscraper in Paris. Thinking that he has a date set up with beautiful executive Marie-Joelle (who in reality hates his guts), Ramzy stays at work late while Eric hangs around with him.

recommendations.title: The Toy
recommendations.overview: On one of his bratty son Eric's annual visits, the plutocrat U.S. Bates takes him to his department store and offers him anything in it as a gift. Eric chooses a black janitor who has made him laugh with his antics. At first the man suffers many indi

recommendations.title: Pollyanna
recommendations.overview: A young girl comes to an embittered town and confronts its attitude with her determination to see the best in life.

recommendations.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
recommendations.overview: World War I has left golfer Rannulph Junuh a poker-playing alcoholic, his perfect swing gone. Now, however, he needs to get it back to play in a tournament to save the financially ravaged golf course of a long-ago sweetheart. Help arrives in the form

recommendations.title: The Idle Class
recommendations.overview: At an upper class golf resort, a tramp discovers he's the lookalike of a rich man with a beautiful, unhappy wife.

recommendations.title: Like Mike 2: Streetball
recommendations.overview: Another young boy with 'hoop dreams' finds an old pair of Michael Jordan's sneakers and can suddenly play ball like the greatest player in the world.

recommendations.title: The Rover
recommendations.overview: Ten years after a severe economic collapse in the western world, lawlessness reigns and life is cheap. Eric is a lone drifter, and his car is his only possession. When a gang steals it, Eric comes across the injured Rey, left behind by the car thieve

recommendations.title: Happy Gilmore 2
recommendations.overview: Happy Gilmore isn't done with golf — not by a long shot. Since his retirement after his first Tour Championship win, Gilmore returns to finance his daughter's ballet classes.

recommendations.title: Starred Up
recommendations.overview: 19-year-old Eric, arrogant and ultra-violent, is prematurely transferred to the same adult prison facility as his estranged father. As his explosive temper quickly finds him enemies in both prison authorities and fellow inmates — and his already vola

recommendations.title: Tell Me What You Want
recommendations.overview: After his father's death, Eric Zimmerman travels to Spain to oversee his company's branches. In Madrid, he falls for Judith and engage in an intense, erotic relationship full of exploration. However, Eric fears his secret may end their affair.
